name: designer-skills
description: The Designer Skills suite: agentic skills, commands, and plugins for design in the agent era — design practice, AI product design, UX program management, design leadership, and inclusive design. One install surfaces every collection; each lives in its own repo.

plugins.name: design-research
plugins.description: User research skills for designers: personas, empathy maps, journey maps, interview scripts, usability testing, and card sorting.

plugins.name: design-systems
plugins.description: Design system skills: component specs, design tokens, naming conventions, spacing and grid systems, accessibility standards, and documentation.

plugins.name: ux-strategy
plugins.description: UX strategy skills: information architecture, content strategy, navigation patterns, user flows, task analysis, and competitive UX audits.

plugins.name: ui-design
plugins.description: UI design skills: color palettes, typography systems, layout grids, responsive breakpoints, dark mode specs, visual hierarchy, and brand alignment.

plugins.name: interaction-design
plugins.description: Interaction design skills: micro-interactions, animation principles, state machines, gesture patterns, error handling UX, and feedback patterns.

plugins.name: prototyping-testing
plugins.description: Prototyping and testing skills: wireframe specs, usability heuristics, heuristic evaluations, accessibility audits, A/B test design, and benchmark analysis.

plugins.name: design-ops
plugins.description: Design operations skills: handoff specs, design critique facilitation, design sprint planning, asset management, and design debt audits.

plugins.name: designer-toolkit
plugins.description: Designer utility skills: portfolio review, resume building, case study structure, design presentations, stakeholder communication, and design briefs.

plugins.name: visual-critique
plugins.description: Visual critique skills: hierarchy analysis, brand consistency checks against mood/voice/tokens, composition evaluation, and typography audits — with a /critique-screen command that compiles a prioritised fix list.

plugins.name: program-planning
plugins.description: Plan and scope UX programs: roadmaps, dependency maps, capacity planning, prioritisation.

plugins.name: stakeholder-comms
plugins.description: Stakeholder mapping, status reporting, executive updates, alignment workshops, escalation.

plugins.name: delivery-execution
plugins.description: Cycle orchestration, risk registers, blocker triage, launch readiness, retrospectives.

plugins.name: cross-functional-alignment
plugins.description: Intake, decision logs, working agreements, RACI, and OKR linkage across functions.

plugins.name: measurement-ops
plugins.description: Program health: KPIs, dashboards, research ops, design ops metrics, impact reporting.

plugins.name: process-design
plugins.description: How the team works: workflows, governance, rituals, scaling playbooks, retrospectives.

plugins.name: people-management
plugins.description: 1:1s, feedback, growth plans, performance reviews, career ladders, difficult conversations.

plugins.name: team-building
plugins.description: Hiring loops, job specs, portfolio review, onboarding, team topology, psychological safety.

plugins.name: design-strategy
plugins.description: Design vision, strategy docs, org-level principles, investment cases, portfolio prioritisation.

plugins.name: org-influence
plugins.description: Executive narrative, influence mapping, advocacy, securing resources, managing up.

plugins.name: operating-cadence
plugins.description: Design reviews at scale, planning cadence, decision frameworks, delegation, operating rhythm.

plugins.name: leadership-craft
plugins.description: Self-leadership, change leadership, conflict resolution, mentorship, leadership ethics.

plugins.name: model-interaction-design
plugins.description: Interaction patterns for AI products: mixed-initiative flow, handoff protocols, error personality.

plugins.name: ai-alignment-reasoning
plugins.description: Alignment reasoning and harm anticipation translated into practitioner design skills.

plugins.name: system-behavior-shaping
plugins.description: Shape system behaviour: defaults, guardrails, refusals, and behavioural contracts.

plugins.name: evaluation
plugins.description: Evaluate agentic experiences: behaviour evals, trust calibration, failure analysis.

plugins.name: design-agent-orchestration
plugins.description: Design how agents collaborate, hand off, and stay legible to people.

plugins.name: prompt-architecture
plugins.description: Structure prompts and context as a design material, not an afterthought.

plugins.name: cognitive-accessibility
plugins.description: Design for how people actually think: cognitive load, plain language, wayfinding, focus, memory, error recovery.

plugins.name: inclusive-interaction
plugins.description: Multi-modal interactions that adapt to how people move, perceive, and communicate.

plugins.name: accessible-content
plugins.description: Structure content that works for screen readers, cognitive differences, and diverse literacy levels.

plugins.name: inclusive-personas
plugins.description: User stories, personas, and scenarios that include disability from the start.

plugins.name: adaptive-interfaces
plugins.description: Design systems that respect user preferences and adapt to individual needs.

plugins.name: accessibility-decisions
plugins.description: Document, communicate, and maintain accessibility decisions across teams and time.
